pending_tasks.title: Enhance evaluator with pixel art specific metrics
pending_tasks.description: Add evaluation dimensions: outline clarity, palette usage rate, shape readability, color ramp quality. Current evaluator is too lenient.

pending_tasks.title: Fix CPPN initial complexity
pending_tasks.description: Increase initial hidden node count and evolution generations. Current textures are mostly simple gradients.

pending_tasks.title: Add reference-image-driven evolution
pending_tasks.description: Support providing reference images, evaluator computes SSIM/perceptual similarity to reference.

pending_tasks.title: Fix gem/star shape visibility
pending_tasks.description: Adjust default SDF parameters to ensure all shapes are clearly visible at 64x64.

pending_tasks.title: Multi-layer render compositing
pending_tasks.description: Base color + texture + lighting + outline layers rendered independently then composited.

pending_tasks.title: Per-frame SDF parameter animation
pending_tasks.description: Each frame can have different SDF parameters (radius, angle changes) for true shape animation.

pending_tasks.title: GIF/APNG animation export
pending_tasks.description: Direct export of previewable animation files instead of just PNG spritesheets.

pending_tasks.title: Register math models
pending_tasks.description: Register SDF, noise, animation curves into MathModelRegistry to populate the empty registry.

pending_tasks.title: Sub-pixel rendering
pending_tasks.description: Implement sub-pixel positioning for smoother animation transitions.

pending_tasks.title: Particle system
pending_tasks.description: Simple SDF particle system for effects (sparks, smoke, trails).

pending_tasks.title: Palette-constrained rendering
pending_tasks.description: Use palette colors directly during rendering instead of post-quantization.

pending_tasks.title: Multi-objective optimization (NSGA-II)
pending_tasks.description: Simultaneously optimize quality, diversity, and style consistency.

pending_tasks.title: Knowledge distillation from tutorials
pending_tasks.description: Auto-distill rules from pixel art tutorials and papers.

pending_tasks.title: Web preview UI
pending_tasks.description: Simple web interface to preview evolution process in real-time.

pending_tasks.title: Unity/Godot exporter
pending_tasks.description: Generate engine-specific import configurations for game engines.

capability_gaps: Evaluator too lenient: no pixel-art-specific quality metrics
CPPN textures too simple: need more complex initial topologies
Animation is transform-only: no bone-driven deformation
Knowledge base empty: no distilled rules or registered models

new_modules: mathart/sdf/renderer.py (v2, 434 lines) - Professional pixel art SDF renderer
mathart/evolution/cppn.py (558 lines) - CPPN MAP-Elites texture evolver
mathart/animation/principles.py (627 lines) - Disney 12 principles math formalization
mathart/pipeline.py (694 lines) - End-to-end asset production pipeline
bugs_fixed: Evolution engine never ran (0 iterations) -> now works

evolution_history.notes: First real evolution run. Pipeline E2E test successful.

sdf_rendering: Inigo Quilez - 2D SDF functions and operations
animation: Thomas & Johnston (1981) - The Illusion of Life (12 Principles)
Lasseter (1987) - Principles of Traditional Animation Applied to 3D
pixel_art: Pixel art dithering: Bayer, Floyd-Steinberg, ordered patterns
OKLAB color space for perceptually uniform color manipulation

custom_notes.key_insight: The project has good code architecture but lacks 'taste' - the evaluator needs to encode what makes pixel art look good. This is the single most important improvement.
custom_notes.next_session_focus: P0 tasks, especially evaluator enhancement. The evaluator is the 'eyes' of the evolution system.
